历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9314 → 7000 → 6609 → 9609 → 9009, showing wide fluctuations. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023, then significantly dropped to 9609 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 9009 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 5 years is about 6600–9600, with a baseline of approximately 9009 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for science (physics category) was: 13 in 2021 → 11 in 2022 → 9 in 2023 → 5 in 2024 → 9 in 2025 → 14 in 2026. In 2026, enrollment increased by about 56% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that theoretically pushes ranking numbers higher (weakening competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 93rd in 2021 → 95th in 2022 → 97th in 2023 → 96th in 2024 → 82nd in 2025 → 81st in 2026, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving general management responses such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and moderate application attention. There is no signal of a cutoff anomaly in historical admission records. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's language-oriented characteristics. Among the admission majors, translation, Spanish, French, and other language majors directly correspond to the A+ discipline, while composite majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology and Management Science and Engineering also benefit from the university's cross-disciplinary training model of language plus specialty.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology (Computer Category) is highly recommended due to social popularity, Management Science and Engineering is relatively hot, and Actuarial Science is an emerging popular direction. Foreign language majors overall have moderate popularity and are generally wait-and-see, but small languages (Spanish, French) still have specific popularity due to Belt and Road demand. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the college entrance exam in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700 for history and physics categories). Estimated by historical proportion, physics category candidates are about 229,400 (an increase of about 32% from 173,300 in 2025). The significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition, causing ranking numbers to decrease. Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan Province is at a medium level, with no special regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two-way offset of the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+56%) and the notable increase in total candidates in Yunnan Province (+32%), along with the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, the advantage of A+ disciplines, and the appeal of newly added popular majors like Actuarial Science, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 11,712, with a range of 11,200–12,200.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data)
- Translation (Multiple Directions).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Management Science and Engineering (Outstanding Management Talent Program)
- Actuarial Science
- Spanish.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- International Economics and Trade (Japanese).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the 11,200–12,200 range. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Management Science and Engineering, Actuarial Science) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Translation) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (International Economics and Trade (Japanese)) as a safety net. When the ranking is near the lower limit of the range, you can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology.
